Operation 'shops#update' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Original summary and description are too vague. Added clarity about what can be updated, authentication context, return value, and side effects. Improved terminology consistency with 'store' and 'shop' usage in the API context.

data.current_description: Update store information
data.description_suggestion: Updates the authenticated store's information and configuration settings in Judge.me. Accepts store details such as name, domain, and other shop-specific settings. Returns the updated shop object with all current configuration. Changes take effect immediately and may affect widget behavior and review collection.
data.reasoning: Original summary and description are too vague. Added clarity about what can be updated, authentication context, return value, and side effects. Improved terminology consistency with 'store' and 'shop' usage in the API context.

message: Operation 'comments#create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks input/output details and clarity about prerequisites. Added specificity about app requirement, expected inputs, return value, and immediate availability for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Create a checkout comment. Available in Checkout Comments app only.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new checkout comment for a store. This operation is only available when the Checkout Comments app is installed and enabled. Accepts comment content and associated checkout information. Returns the created comment object with metadata. Comments are immediately available in the checkout flow.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks input/output details and clarity about prerequisites. Added specificity about app requirement, expected inputs, return value, and immediate availability for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'settings#index' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_input_details. Original summary 'Index' is too generic and not action-oriented.
